emotional_tone: Reassuring, calm, premium, technological but warm. Zero conflict.

headings.weight_strategy: Radical contrast. Use font-light (300) for elegant oversized headers, and font-semibold (600) for structured subheadings.
headings.usage: H1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl, H2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl, H3: text-xl sm:text-2xl

body.weight_strategy: font-normal (400) for body, font-medium (500) for UI elements

colors.notes: The palette is designed to feel like an expensive piece of furniture or wellness device, not a sterile tech gadget. Primary is a deep pine green, acting as the anchor. Accent is a warm terracotta for alerts/CTAs to break the calm only when necessary.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous. Use p-8, p-12, py-24 for sections. Components should breathe.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Concentric and soft. Outer bento cards: rounded-3xl. Inner elements: rounded-xl or rounded-2xl.

grids.marketing: Mode A: Tetris Grid. Asymmetric, with large overlapping images and generous negative space.
grids.dashboard: Mode B: Control Room Grid. 3 or 4 columns. Dense but clean. Gap-6.

surfaces.dashboard_cards: Solid background (#FFFFFF) with 1px border (#E2E4E1), no default shadow. Hover: shadow-lg and -translate-y-1.

components_strategy.marketing: Custom HTML/Tailwind. Use framer-motion for smooth scroll reveals. Avoid Shadcn for large marketing sections to maintain a creative layout.
components_strategy.dashboard: Shadcn UI heavily customized. Specifically use Card, Switch (for rules), Slider, Dialog (rule creation), Avatar, Select, Tabs.
components_strategy.icons: @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone variant) for a premium, dual-tone tech feel.
components_strategy.animations: Subtle and organic. Elements should fade and slide up gently. Use react-spring or framer-motion. Dashboard micro-interactions should be snappy but smooth.

sections: Hero: Overlapping layout. Large Outfit typography on the left. Right side features 'hero_safe_lifestyle' image. CTA: 'Installer le Safe' (Primary), 'Voir comment ça marche' (Secondary text/link).
How it works: 3 distinct numbered steps. Bento style cards. 1. Placer le téléphone, 2. Verrouillage auto, 3. Temps en famille.
Product Details: Show 'product_macro' image with floating glassmorphism UI pills indicating 'Batterie 98%', 'Verrouillé', 'Règle: Nuit'.
Trust/Difference: Why it's not 'Big Brother'. Emphasize physical rules over digital spying. Use 'family_lifestyle' image.
Pricing: 2-column bento. Base safe (99-199€) vs Premium Sub (4.99€/mo).
Footer: Large typography, dark background (Primary color #1A3636) with light text for contrast shift.

app_auth.layout: Split screen. Left: Authentication form (Email/Password or Google). Right: 'abstract_bg' image with a reassuring quote about family time.

dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (Desktop) / Bottom bar (Mobile). Top area shows household status.
sections: Safe Status Card: Real-time presence of phone, battery ring chart, lock status toggle. Highlight with subtle glowing border if locked.
Quick Actions: Row of buttons (Créer règle, Mode focus maintenant, Déverrouiller code parent).
Rules (Règles): List of active rules with Shadcn Switches. Click to edit days/hours in a Dialog.
History Timeline: Vertical timeline showing events (Placé, Verrouillé, Tentative, Déverrouillé).
Alerts: Notification center. Use Accent color for absence/unauthorized open, Warning for low battery.
Settings: Master code, WiFi, Vacation mode toggle.

hero_safe_lifestyle.description: Wide lifestyle shot of the smart safe in a living room, family in background.

product_macro.description: Close-up macro photography of the minimalist smart safe.
product_macro.usage: Product feature section on landing page

abstract_bg.description: Abstract calm gradient background with organic flowing shapes.
abstract_bg.usage: Auth page background or decorative sections

family_lifestyle.description: Woman relaxing on couch with child nearby.

testimonial_family.description: A happy family of three sitting on a couch.
testimonial_family.usage: Social proof or Parents profiles in dashboard

testing_requirements.data_testid_convention: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid with kebab-case role-based names (e.g., data-testid="create-rule-button", data-testid="safe-status-toggle").

installation_instructions.notes: Ensure fonts Outfit and Manrope are imported in the main CSS or via Google Fonts.
